name: Andrés Manuel López Obrador
quote: We will know the truth about what happened to the 43 students from Ayotzinapa. We will not rest until justice is served.

name: Vidulfo Rosales Sierra
role: Attorney for Ayotzinapa Families / Tlachinollan Center
quote: The families will not stop until all 43 are found and those responsible — including the military — are held accountable.

name: UN Committee on Enforced Disappearances
quote: Mexico must conduct a thorough, independent investigation and bring all perpetrators to justice, including state actors.

name: Enrique Peña Nieto
role: President of Mexico (2012–2018) — Oversaw Initial Investigation
quote: Ya me cansé. (I'm already tired of the subject.) [Remark widely condemned as dismissive of the families' grief]

name: Jesús Murillo Karam
role: Attorney General (2012–2015) — Author of 'Historical Truth'; arrested 2022
quote: The truth is that the students were killed by Guerreros Unidos and incinerated at the Cocula dump. [Later fully debunked by GIEI]

name: Tomás Zerón de Lucio
role: Former AIC Director — Accused of Evidence Tampering; Fled to Israel
quote: [Denies all charges; claims his investigation was professional and evidence was legitimately discovered]

name: Alejandro Encinas Rodríguez
role: Undersecretary for Human Rights — Led Truth Commission (2019–2023)
quote: This was a crime of state. The state — through its agents — participated in the disappearances. We will not allow institutional protection of the military to continue.

name: Claudia Paz y Paz
quote: The government's version is scientifically and logistically impossible. The real story has yet to be told — and it implicates more than local officials.

name: Ángela María Buitrago
quote: The pattern of obstruction, evidence tampering, and torture of witnesses points to a systematic cover-up at the highest levels of the Mexican state.

name: Epifanio Guerrero Astudillo
role: Parent of Jhosivani Guerrero de la Cruz — Identified Student
quote: My son was identified. But what about the other 42? We cannot rest. We will not rest. The state owes us the truth.

name: Mario César González
role: Parent of Cesár Manuel González Hernández — Disappeared Student
quote: We have been searching for years while the guilty ones walk free. Where are our children?

name: General José Rodríguez Pérez
role: 27th Infantry Battalion Commander — Arrested Sep 2022 for Forced Disappearance
quote: [Denies charges; military legal team argues the arrests are politically motivated and lack evidentiary basis]

name: Argentine Forensic Anthropology Team (EAAF)
role: Independent Forensic Body — Identified 3 of 43 Students
quote: We can confirm only what the evidence shows. Our work is constrained by access to sites and evidence. Three identifications in 11 years is a humanitarian failure.

name: José Luis Abarca Velázquez
role: Iguala Mayor (2012–2014) — Convicted of Homicide and Forced Disappearance
quote: [Denies ordering the attacks; convicted and imprisoned; families argue his conviction served as a distraction from federal and military accountability]

name: Claudia Sheinbaum
role: President of Mexico (2024–present) — Inherited Unresolved Case
quote: The Ayotzinapa case will continue to be investigated. We will not abandon the families.
